name: Siluriana
description:
So after I made the Eye of Oculus I figured I'd make another one like it. This is Siluriana, an ocean world from a book called "Alien Worlds: your guide to extraterrestrial life", speculating how life might evolve on other planets.

Thought about making an ai of it before, figured it might be fun for people wanting to explore an alien world (and one full of predators)
creator: Kratos_Zangoose
